texto: Don't use words too big for the subject. Don't say infinitely when you mean very
autor: otherwise you'll have no word left when you want to talk about something really infinite.
explicacao: Citação de otherwise you'll have no word left when you want to talk about something really infinite. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Don't use words too big for the subject. Don't say infinitely when you mean very” articula reflexao, c-s-lewis, words em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
